summary: Lead Observability, APM, and Telemetry Analytics Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience across application performance monitoring, enterprise monitoring platforms, capacity analytics, Python automation, production support, technical documentation, and stakeholder communication. Deep background with Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics, AppDynamics, CA APM/Introscope, BMC TrueSight/TSCO, dashboards, alerting, transaction tracing, SLA/KPI reporting, operational readiness, and reliability-focused analytics. Strong fit for enterprise application monitoring roles that require platform strategy, architecture alignment, resilience, performance, documentation, and communication with technical and executive stakeholders.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built and supported telemetry analytics pipelines that ingested operational data from 6,000+ infrastructure endpoints into curated datasets for monitoring, capacity planning, forecasting, and executive reporting.
Integrated BMC TrueSight/TSCO, CA APM/Wily, AppDynamics, and infrastructure telemetry into unified reporting layers used by engineering, operations, and leadership teams.
Analyzed performance and capacity data to identify infrastructure hotspots, anomalies, underutilized systems, reliability risks, and opportunities to improve operational efficiency.
Developed Python, SQL, Pandas, and PySpark-oriented automation for telemetry extraction, validation, reconciliation, exception handling, recurring reporting, and production support workflows.

Created dashboards, operational reports, alerting inputs, KPI-style summaries, runbooks, data dictionaries, and stakeholder narratives to support incident review, troubleshooting, and decision-making.
Built forecasting workflows using Prophet and scikit-learn to identify capacity bottlenecks months ahead and support proactive resiliency and infrastructure planning.
Partnered with infrastructure, application, operations, and management teams to explain risks, recommend corrective actions, and improve monitoring, reporting, and support processes.
Applied regulated-enterprise practices around access controls, auditability, secure data handling, disaster-recovery awareness, documentation, and production reliability.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical hospitality systems, improving visibility into web, mobile, and service performance.
Implemented End User Monitoring and end-to-end transaction tracing to expose user-experience issues, application dependencies, and production bottlenecks.
Upgraded Dynatrace from 6.5 to 7.0 and enforced TLS 1.2 security while maintaining production monitoring continuity and avoiding monitoring regressions.
Integrated HP Performance Center with Dynatrace to correlate load-test behavior with APM telemetry and support performance engineering decisions.
Led the FAST project, mining real-user and synthetic performance telemetry to identify trends, anomalies, and optimization recommendations adopted by engineering teams.
Maintained monitoring documentation and supported troubleshooting across application, infrastructure, and operations teams.

experience.title: Senior Consultant / CA APM SME
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for a regulated financial-services environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, management modules, and reporting standards adopted across enterprise monitoring environments.
Built Perl/Korn Shell and SQL-driven extraction scripts that automated recurring telemetry reporting and replaced manual weekly exports.
Partnered with J2EE/WebLogic, middleware, database, and operations teams to diagnose bottlenecks using APM telemetry, transaction traces, and production evidence.
Delivered monitoring onboarding guidance, operational documentation, technical training, and knowledge-sharing materials for application and support teams.
Supported monitoring standards, onboarding patterns, and operational procedures across large application estates.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom web applications under load to identify throughput limits, thread contention, JDBC constraints, heap pressure, CPU usage, and garbage-collection risks.
Installed and configured JMX monitoring, Wily Introscope, and thread dump automation scripts for real-time visibility during performance tests.
Documented performance baselines, regression thresholds, and release-readiness evidence used by engineering teams.

education.degree: Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Observability / APM: Dynatrace AppMon, Gomez Synthetic Monitoring, AppDynamics, CA APM / Introscope, CA CEM, CA ADA, BMC TrueSight / TSCO, JMX Monitoring, EUM/RUM, transaction tracing, synthetic monitoring
skills.Enterprise App Monitoring: Application monitoring, infrastructure monitoring, on-prem/cloud monitoring patterns, dashboards, alerting, integrations, KPI/SLA reporting, monitoring onboarding, operational readiness
skills.Reliability / SRE Concepts: SLI/SLO concepts, error-budget awareness, availability, latency, resiliency, capacity, disaster-recovery planning awareness, incident support, root-cause analysis, production support
skills.Architecture / Product Engineering: Monitoring platform strategy, reference architecture alignment, reusable monitoring patterns, technology roadmaps, environment sizing, deployment strategy support, technical standards, documentation
skills.Automation & Development: Python, SQL, PL/SQL, Perl, Korn Shell, Bash concepts, Java/J2EE legacy experience, C/C++, Pandas, PySpark, reporting automation, telemetry extraction, validation, reconciliation
skills.Cloud / Systems: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Athena, Redshift, EC2, ECS, IAM concepts, CloudWatch concepts, Linux/Unix, Windows fundamentals, WebLogic/WebSphere, middleware and database monitoring
skills.Analytics & Reporting: Capacity analytics, forecasting, Prophet, scikit-learn, operational dashboards, Streamlit, Plotly, matplotlib, seaborn, executive reporting, trend and anomaly analysis concepts
skills.Modern Observability Adjacent: New Relic awareness, Datadog awareness, OpenTelemetry concepts, Splunk concepts, Grafana concepts, Kubernetes awareness, agentic AI observability automation concepts
skills.Delivery & Communication: Agile/Scrum/Kanban, technical documentation, presentations, stakeholder communication, executive-facing narratives, knowledge sharing, mentoring, cross-functional collaboration

projects.name: Enterprise APM and Monitoring Standards
projects.description: Designed and supported dashboards, alert thresholds, monitoring onboarding guidance, operational documentation, and knowledge-sharing materials across large enterprise Dynatrace, CA APM, BMC TrueSight, and AppDynamics environments.

projects.name: HorizonScale — Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a capacity forecasting platform that transformed infrastructure telemetry into curated datasets, Prophet/scikit-learn forecasts, capacity-risk indicators, dashboards, and stakeholder reports for proactive resource planning.

projects.name: Dynatrace AppMon / Synthetic Monitoring Modernization
projects.description: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring, upgraded Dynatrace versions, implemented EUM and transaction tracing, and integrated load-test telemetry with APM evidence for engineering teams.
